target_system.capability: Create an original Japanese X Article from a permitted source while preserving evidence integrity and explaining a useful mechanism.
target_system.future_user: Agent drafting source-grounded Japanese X Articles for human publication review.
target_system.execution_environment: Text-capable agent with filesystem access; publication and live analytics remain human or platform-owned.
target_system.source_of_truth: Markdown article draft plus source manifest and evidence ledger.
target_system.distribution_context: Japanese X Article prepared for human publication review; live analytics remain external evidence.

known_limits: The source corpus contains one article, so source-creator doctrine is not recoverable.
The project doctrine is user-confirmed and evaluation-derived rather than induced from a longitudinal creator corpus.
Live impressions, dwell time, and conversion remain untested.
